prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约461名、416名、442名、423名、419名。近五年位次整体在416–461区间窄幅波动，2025年基准位次约419名，近三年波动幅度约±23名，整体呈高位稳定态势；北京大学在北京市综合类招生计划：2021年185人、2022年188人、2023年185人、2024年185人、2025年191人；2026年（招生计划文件）计划197人，较2025年增加6人，扩幅约3.1%，属小幅扩招，对竞争压力有轻微缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续位居全国第2名，是中国最顶尖的高等学府之一，对全国考生具有极强吸引力；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全、食堂宿舍等管理类事件，但未出现重大招生断档或投档线异常信号；抖音热度排名总榜第3（高热），短视频平台曝光量极大，反映报考关注度持续高涨。历史投档异常记录中未见北京大学在北京市出现断档；北京大学拥有A+学科涵盖数学、物理学、化学、生物学、计算机科学与技术、法学、经济学、中国语言文学、哲学、社会学等数十个，A-及以上学科超过30个，学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度显示计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学维持偏热，法学、金融/财经呈分化观望。北京市2026年高考考生总数约84900人，较2025年的65434人增长约29.7%，考生规模大幅扩大，竞争显著加剧；北京大学位于北京市，为本省招生，对本市考生具有天然的地域偏好优势。2。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次高位稳定（419名基准）、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+3.1%）、考生总数大幅增长（+29.7%）以及学校顶尖层次与高热关注度等因素：扩招对位次有轻微后移作用，但考生大幅增长带来的竞争加剧效应更为显著，推动位次前移；声誉偏负面影响有限。经综合权衡，预测2026年最低录取位次约417名，区间369–465名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工商管理类（含金融学、金融学（金融经济学）、会计学、市场营销）
- 文科试验班类（元培）（含中国语言文学类、考古学、历史学类、哲学类、社会学类、法学、新闻传播学类、经济学类、工商管理类、公共管理类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 理科试验班类（元培）（含数学类、物理学类、地球物理学类、计算机类、电子信息类）
- 数学类
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息科学与技术、微电子科学与工程）
- 物理学类（含物理学、大气科学（大气与海洋））。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 法学
- 经济学类（含经济学、金融学、国际经济与贸易、保险学、财政学）
- 中国语言文学类（含汉语言文学、汉语言、古典文献学、应用语言学）
- 新闻传播学类（含新闻学）
- 社会学类（含社会学、社会工作）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 北京大学在北京市综合类录取位次极高（预测约417名），位次在预测区间369–465名内的考生可积极报考。建议位次在369名以前（优于区间下限）的考生以一二档王牌专业（元培、工商管理类、计算机类等）为主攻方向；位次在369–417名之间的考生以二档专业为主、一档冲刺；位次在417–465名之间的考生以三档专业为主、二档冲刺。北大各专业学科评估均为顶尖水平，即使三档专业在全国范围内仍属顶级，报考价值极高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Peking University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 461, 416, 442, 423, and 419 respectively. Over the past five years, rankings have fluctuated narrowly within the 416–461 range, with a baseline ranking of about 419 in 2025 and a fluctuation range of approximately ±23 in the last three years, showing a high and stable trend. Peking University's enrollment plans in Beijing's comprehensive category: 185 in 2021, 188 in 2022, 185 in 2023, 185 in 2024, and 191 in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan (according to the enrollment plan document) is 197, an increase of 6 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 3.1%, which is a slight expansion and has a minor easing effect on competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 2nd nationally in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, making it one of the top higher education institutions in China, with strong appeal to candidates nationwide. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety, cafeteria, and dormitory management incidents, but there have been no major enrollment gaps or abnormal admission score line signals. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 3rd overall (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting sustained high attention from applicants. Historical records show no enrollment gaps for Peking University in Beijing. Peking University has dozens of A+ disciplines including mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, computer science and technology, law, economics, Chinese language and literature, philosophy, sociology, etc., with over 30 disciplines rated A- or above, making its academic strength top in the country and highly attractive to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows that engineering majors such as computer science, electronics/information and communication, and electrical engineering continue to be highly recommended, clinical medicine and stomatology remain relatively hot, while law and finance/economics show divergence and wait-and-see. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Beijing is about 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Peking University is located in Beijing and recruits locally, giving it a natural regional preference advantage for local candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high and stable historical rankings (baseline 419), the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+3.1%), the significant increase in candidate numbers (+29.7%), and the top-tier level and high attention of the school: the expansion has a slight backward effect on rankings, but the intensified competition effect from the large increase in candidates is more significant, pushing rankings forward; the slightly negative reputation has limited impact. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 417, with a range of 369–465.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Business Administration (including Finance, Finance (Financial Economics), Accounting, Marketing)
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Yuanpei) (including Chinese Language and Literature, Archaeology, History, Philosophy, Sociology, Law, Journalism and Communication, Economics, Business Administration, Public Administration).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Science Experimental Class (Yuanpei) (including Mathematics, Physics, Geophysics, Computer Science, Electronic Information)
- Mathematics
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Engineering)
- Physics (including Physics, Atmospheric Science (Atmosphere and Ocean)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Law
- Economics (including Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade, Insurance, Public Finance)
- Chinese Language and Literature (including Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese Language, Classical Philology, Applied Linguistics)
- Journalism and Communication (including Journalism)
- Sociology (including Sociology, Social Work).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Peking University's admission ranking in Beijing's comprehensive category is extremely high (predicted around 417). Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 369–465 can actively apply. It is recommended that candidates with rankings better than 369 (above the lower limit of the range) focus on Tier 1 and Tier 2 flagship majors (Yuanpei, Business Administration, Computer Science, etc.); candidates with rankings between 369 and 417 focus on Tier 2 majors with Tier 1 as a stretch; candidates with rankings between 417 and 465 focus on Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as a stretch. All majors at Peking University are top-tier in discipline evaluations, and even Tier 3 majors are still top-level nationwide, making them highly valuable for application.
